creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #1)

I was thinking about this last night and I think I understand why imp changed it  though I have not read the full logic to really understand to what all these variables expand to.

The old and suggested version likely removes GENERIC and with that GENEIC-MMCCAM GENERIC-NOINET or whatever else people have (similar for LINT) and that might be a side effect trying to be avoided?
